generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental monitoring sensor for temperature in building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental monitoring sensor for occupancy in building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental monitoring sensor for light levels in building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity in digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance RevitEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Revit BIM authoring tool for creating BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectOptimizationService
]

instance MDEFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering framework for transforming BIM models into runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectOptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for building operations using historical and real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight, ODTEValidationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based optimization of energy consumption in lighting and HVAC systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight, LightingControlAction, HVACControlAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of visual comfort in lighting systems based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, LightingAdjustmentAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of non-visual health effects in lighting systems using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectInsight, LightingHealthAdjustmentAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualRepresentationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of building systems for facility management"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts for building systems"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy consumption optimization insights for facility decisions"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comfort optimization insights for lighting systems"
]

instance HealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effect optimization insights for lighting systems"
]

instance VisualRepresentationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations"
]

instance ODTEValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement metric for validating digital twin evolution"
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control of lighting systems based on energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control of HVAC systems based on energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of lighting for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingHealthAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of lighting for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with Building Control System runtime metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFrameworkEnabler
]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building infrastructure for Living Lab case study with modular, service-oriented architecture supporting scalable deployment across heterogeneous systems"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "BCS actuator for lighting control in building systems"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "BCS actuator for HVAC control in building systems"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the digital twin (e.g., for lighting or HVAC adjustments) are transmitted to Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time physical adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data updates, though specific latency metrics are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular constellation of services orchestrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, with BIM as the semantic backbone and Unreal Engine providing interactive visualization, enabling holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from design to operation, with specific focus on the 'as operated' phase for real-time monitoring and optimization during facility management."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated through the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; semantic coherence maintained via MDE to prevent drift, with real-time synchronization ensuring alignment between digital and physical states."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto used for real-time data exchange, though specific network protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP) are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC), Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocol standards, and standardized extension points for service integration to ensure interoperability across AECO systems."
]
